plan.failureSummary: The chatbot backend is unresponsive and does not stream any responses to submitted queries. After sending the initial legal compliance question ('What is the difference between a trademark and a patent?'), the interface stayed blank indefinitely, with no response returned. The agent successfully waited and verified settings but ultimately had to mark the objective not completable due to this broken upstream chat service.
observedIndicators: The final screenshot shows the user's sent message 'What is the difference between a trademark and a patent?' but absolutely no response from the chatbot underneath.
The agent repeatedly waited and checked settings to verify API key requirements, but the app failed to return any text response.
High persistent failure rate in flow history (all of the last 14 runs failed), indicating a chronic application backend outage or API configuration issue with briefcase.chat.

remediationSteps.summary: Fix the chatbot backend connection and streaming response issue on briefcase.chat.
remediationSteps.details: Inspect the backend logs and API connections of briefcase.chat (specifically OpenAI API integrations or key limits) to resolve the silent failure when processing chat streams.

plan.notes: This is a clear application defect where the LLM integration or backend of briefcase.chat is failing to stream or return responses, rendering the chatbot utility entirely non-functional.
